# NoDAW Studio Suite

> AI-powered audio workflow suite and VST product showcase.

## Canonical URL
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/

## Product Landing Pages (SPA hash routes)
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/#/vst/timestretchx
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/#/vst/repairait
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/#/vst/clipit
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/#/vst/chronos-dynamic-eq
- https://myaiplug.github.io/nodaw-launcher/#/vst/saturateit

## Primary Capabilities
- AI stem separation
- Pitch and tempo manipulation
- Audio repair and restoration
- Clipping and loudness processing
- Dynamic EQ and saturation workflows

## Repository
- https://github.com/myaiplug/nodaw-launcher
